ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project was last updated */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, archived) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the project started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual end date of the project */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Allocated budget for the project */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  "research_objectives" TEXT /* Detailed description of the research objectives */,
  "project_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the image belongs to */,
  "image_name" TEXT /* Name of the image file */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* Path to the image file */,
  "uploaded_at" TEXT /* Date and time the image was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the image */,
  "image_size" TEXT /* Size of the image file in bytes */,
  "image_format" TEXT /* Format of the image file (e.g., TIFF, PNG, JPEG) */,
  "image_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the image (e.g., 1024x768) */,
  "capture_date" TEXT /* Date and time the image was captured */,
  "capture_device" TEXT /* Device used to capture the image */,
  "image_metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the image (e.g., camera settings, environmental conditions) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cells" (
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cell */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image the cell was identified in */,
  "frame" INTEGER /* Frame number in the image sequence */,
  "cell_id_in_frame" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the cell within the frame */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the cell */,
  "cell_length" REAL /* Length of the cell */,
  "cell_sinuosity" REAL /* Sinuosity of the cell */,
  "cell_width" REAL /* Width of the cell */,
  "max_cell_intensity_paqa" REAL /* Maximum intensity of the cell in the PaQa channel */,
  "mean_cell_intensity_paqa" REAL /* Mean intensity of the cell in the PaQa channel */,
  "median_cell_intensity_paqa" REAL /* Median intensity of the cell in the PaQa channel */,
  "min_cell_intensity_paqa" REAL /* Minimum intensity of the cell in the PaQa channel */,
  "max_cell_intensity_rfp" REAL /* Maximum intensity of the cell in the RFP channel */,
  "mean_cell_intensity_rfp" REAL /* Mean intensity of the cell in the RFP channel */,
  "median_cell_intensity_rfp" REAL /* Median intensity of the cell in the RFP channel */,
  "min_cell_intensity_rfp" REAL /* Minimum intensity of the cell in the RFP channel */,
  "cell_type" TEXT /* Type of cell (e.g., epithelial, fibroblast) */,
  "cell_state" TEXT /* State of the cell (e.g., normal, apoptotic, necrotic) */,
  "cell_lineage" TEXT /* Lineage or lineage ID of the cell (if applicable) */,
  "cell_cycle_stage" TEXT /* Stage of the cell cycle (e.g., G1, S, G2, M) */,
  "cell_movement" REAL /* Measure of cell movement or migration */,
  "cell_shape" TEXT /* Description of the cell shape (e.g., circular, elongated) */,
  "cell_membrane_intensity" REAL /* Intensity measurements specific to the cell membrane */,
  "cell_nucleus_intensity" REAL /* Intensity measurements specific to the cell nucleus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cell_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cells_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin, guest) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user is affiliated with */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the institution */,
  "position" TEXT /* User's position or role within the institution */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* User's contact number */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Path to the user's profile picture */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "role_level" INTEGER /* Numerical value representing the level of the role (e.g., 1 for admin, 2 for researcher) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the project or image */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being accessed */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_collaborators" (
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration link */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the user is collaborating on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaborating user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the collaborator */,
  "invited_at" TEXT /* Date and time the collaboration invitation was sent */,
  "accepted_at" TEXT /* Date and time the collaboration invitation was accepted */,
  "collaborator_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the collaboration */,
  "collaborator_status" TEXT /* Status of the collaboration (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaborator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_collaborators_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_collaborators_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_collaborators_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_params" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis parameter */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the parameter is associated with */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the analysis parameter */,
  "param_value" TEXT /* Value of the analysis parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the parameter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the parameter was last updated */,
  "param_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the analysis parameter */,
  "param_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter (e.g., pixels, micrometers) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_params_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the result is associated with */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image the result is associated with */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date and time the analysis was performed */,
  "result_data" TEXT /* JSON object containing the results of the analysis */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for the analysis */,
  "analysis_tool" TEXT /* Tool or software used for the analysis */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Status of the analysis result (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "result_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image version */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image the version is associated with */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the image */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version (e.g., changes made) */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the version */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_versions_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_versions_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cell the annotation is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the annotation */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of the annotation (e.g., comment, tag) */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the annotation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the annotation was last updated */,
  "annotation_status" TEXT /* Status of the annotation (e.g., active, deleted) */,
  "annotation_visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the annotation (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_cell_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_id") REFERENCES cells ("cell_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
